display.label: Cloud Storage
display.description: Google Cloud Storage buckets with lifecycle, IAM, CORS, and website hosting

globals.label: Project ID
globals.description: GCP Project ID in which the resource will be provisioned.

resource.key_description: A globally unique name for the Cloud Storage bucket. This becomes the map key in Terraform.

fields.label: Bucket name
fields.description: The name of the GCS bucket. Must be globally unique.

validation.pattern_error: Bucket names must be 3-63 characters, start/end with a letter or number, and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and dots.

fields.label: Location
fields.description: The GCS location (region, dual-region, or multi-region) for the bucket.

fields.label: Storage class
fields.description: The default storage class for objects in the bucket.

options.label: Nearline
options.description: Best for data accessed less than once a month.

options.label: Coldline
options.description: Best for data accessed less than once a quarter.

options.label: Archive
options.description: Best for data accessed less than once a year.

fields.label: Object versioning
fields.description: Enable versioning to keep a history of all object changes.

fields.label: Uniform bucket-level access
fields.description: When enabled, access is managed uniformly using IAM policies only (disables per-object ACLs).

fields.label: Force destroy
fields.description: Allow Terraform to delete the bucket even if it contains objects. Use with caution.

fields.label: Labels
fields.description: Key-value labels to attach to the bucket for organization and billing.

sections.label: Networking & CDN
sections.description: Network Endpoint Group (NEG) settings for load balancer integration.

fields.label: Enable Network Endpoint Group
fields.description: Create a serverless NEG for this bucket, enabling it to serve as a backend for a Cloud Load Balancer.

fields.label: NEG default port
fields.description: The default port for the Network Endpoint Group.

fields.label: Port
fields.description: The port used by the NEG endpoint.

fields.label: Data locations
fields.description: A list of individual regions that together make up a dual-region bucket. Only applicable for dual-region location types.

sections.label: Data Protection
sections.description: Retention, soft-delete, and data durability settings.

fields.label: Retention policy
fields.description: Lock objects from deletion for a specified duration. Set to null to disable.

fields.label: Lock policy
fields.description: Once locked, the retention policy cannot be reduced or removed. This is irreversible.

fields.label: Retention period (seconds)
fields.description: The minimum duration (in seconds) that objects must be retained.

fields.label: Soft delete policy
fields.description: Allows recovery of deleted objects within the specified window.

fields.label: Retention duration (seconds)
fields.description: How long deleted objects are retained for recovery. Default is 7 days (604800s).

sections.label: Access Control (IAM)
sections.description: IAM member bindings for this bucket.

fields.label: IAM members
fields.description: A list of IAM role bindings to apply to this bucket.

fields.label: IAM role
fields.description: The IAM role to grant (e.g., roles/storage.objectViewer).

fields.label: Member
fields.description: The identity to grant the role to (e.g., user:email, serviceAccount:sa-email, group:group-email).

sections.label: Website & CORS
sections.description: Static website hosting and Cross-Origin Resource Sharing configuration.

fields.label: Website configuration
fields.description: Configure the bucket to serve as a static website.

fields.label: Main page suffix
fields.description: The object name suffix to serve when a directory is requested (e.g., 'index.html').

fields.label: Not found page
fields.description: The object to return when a requested object is not found (e.g., '404.html').

fields.label: CORS rules
fields.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing rules for browser-based access.

fields.label: Allowed origins
fields.description: List of origins allowed to make requests (e.g., https://example.com).

fields.label: Allowed methods
fields.description: HTTP methods allowed for CORS requests.

fields.label: Response headers
fields.description: Headers the browser is allowed to access from the response.

fields.label: Max age (seconds)
fields.description: How long browsers should cache the CORS preflight response.

sections.label: Lifecycle Rules
sections.description: Automatically manage object storage class transitions and deletions.

fields.label: Lifecycle rules
fields.description: Define rules to automatically transition or delete objects based on conditions.

fields.label: Action
fields.description: The action to take when the condition is met.

fields.label: Action type
fields.description: The lifecycle action to perform.

options.label: Set Storage Class
options.description: Transition objects to another storage class.

fields.label: Target storage class
fields.description: The storage class to transition objects to. Required when action type is 'SetStorageClass'.

fields.label: Condition
fields.description: The conditions under which the action is triggered.

fields.label: Age (days)
fields.description: Apply the action to objects older than this many days.

fields.label: Send age if zero
fields.description: Whether to send the age condition when it is 0.

fields.label: Created before
fields.description: Apply to objects created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.label: Object state
fields.description: Apply to objects in this state.

fields.label: Matches storage class
fields.description: Apply only to objects with one of these storage classes.

fields.label: Matches prefix
fields.description: Apply only to objects whose names start with one of these prefixes.

fields.label: Matches suffix
fields.description: Apply only to objects whose names end with one of these suffixes.

fields.label: Number of newer versions
fields.description: Apply to versioned objects with more than this many newer versions.

fields.label: Custom time before
fields.description: Apply to objects whose custom time is before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.label: Days since custom time
fields.description: Apply to objects more than this many days past their custom time.

fields.label: Days since noncurrent time
fields.description: Apply to noncurrent objects more than this many days past becoming noncurrent.

fields.label: Noncurrent time before
fields.description: Apply to noncurrent objects that became noncurrent before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.label: Tag bindings
fields.description: A list of tag values to bind to this bucket (in tagValues/NNNN format).

extras.label: Managed Folder IAM Bindings
extras.description: Grant IAM roles on specific managed folders within GCS buckets.

fields.label: Bucket name
fields.description: The name of the GCS bucket containing the managed folder.

fields.label: Managed folder path
fields.description: The path of the managed folder within the bucket.

fields.label: Member
fields.description: The IAM member to grant access to (e.g., user:email, serviceAccount:sa-email).

fields.label: IAM role
fields.description: The IAM role to grant on the managed folder.
